ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the algorithm used by the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the model was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the model */,
  "created_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the model */,
  "updated_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the model */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the model is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithms" (
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each algorithm */,
  "algorithm_name" TEXT /* Name of the algorithm */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the algorithm */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the algorithm was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the algorithm */,
  "created_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the algorithm */,
  "updated_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the algorithm */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the algorithm is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hyperparameters" (
  "hyperparameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hyperparameter */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the algorithm the hyperparameter belongs to */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the hyperparameter */,
  "parameter_value" TEXT /* Value of the hyperparameter */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the hyperparameter was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the hyperparameter */,
  "created_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the hyperparameter */,
  "updated_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the hyperparameter */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the hyperparameter is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hyperparameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hyperparameters_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the dataset was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the dataset */,
  "created_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the dataset */,
  "updated_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the dataset */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the dataset is active */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Description of the source of the data */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the dataset file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model the metric belongs to */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the performance metric was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the performance metric */,
  "created_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who recorded the performance metric */,
  "updated_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the performance metric */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the performance metric is active */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of the metric (e.g., classification, regression) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model the performance belongs to */,
  "fold_no" INTEGER /* Fold number */,
  "training_score" REAL /* Training score */,
  "validation_score" REAL /* Validation score */,
  "test_score" REAL /* Test score */,
  "time_taken" REAL /* Time taken to train the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the performance entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the performance entry */,
  "created_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the performance entry */,
  "updated_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the performance entry */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the performance entry is active */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used for this performance entry */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model version used for this performance entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_performance_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES model_versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_performance_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_performance_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data scientist, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user account */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the user account is active */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department to which the user belongs */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team to which the user belongs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the model */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access log was created */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the access log entry is active */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model the version belongs to */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the version */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the model version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the model version */,
  "created_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the model version */,
  "updated_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the model version */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the model version is active */,
  "training_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was trained */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset the version belongs to */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the version */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the dataset version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the dataset version */,
  "created_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the dataset version */,
  "updated_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the dataset version */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the dataset version is active */,
  "data_preprocessing_steps" TEXT /* Description of the preprocessing steps applied to the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_versions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_hyperparameters" (
  "hyperparameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hyperparameter */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model the hyperparameter belongs to */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the version the hyperparameter belongs to */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the hyperparameter */,
  "parameter_value" TEXT /* Value of the hyperparameter */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the model hyperparameter was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the model hyperparameter */,
  "created_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the model hyperparameter */,
  "updated_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the model hyperparameter */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the model hyperparameter is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hyperparameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_hyperparameters_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES model_versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_hyperparameters_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_hyperparameters" (
  "hyperparameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hyperparameter */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset the hyperparameter belongs to */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the version the hyperparameter belongs to */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the hyperparameter */,
  "parameter_value" TEXT /* Value of the hyperparameter */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the dataset hyperparameter was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the dataset hyperparameter */,
  "created_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the dataset hyperparameter */,
  "updated_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the dataset hyperparameter */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the dataset hyperparameter is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hyperparameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_hyperparameters_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_hyperparameters_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES dataset_versions ("version_id")
)
